input.organisation_context: No category filter selected. No vendor filter selected.
success_factors: Select the strongest vendor for sofware system.

criteria.label: Core Functionality
criteria.description: Ability of the software to meet primary operational requirements.

criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Estimated time and resources required for deployment and onboarding.

criteria.label: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: Comprehensive cost including licensing, maintenance, and support.

criteria.label: Contract Flexibility
criteria.description: Ability to avoid long-term lock-in and negotiate favorable termination terms.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and market longevity of the software provider.

criteria.label: Sustainability Rating
criteria.description: Vendor's commitment to carbon reduction and sustainable operations.

criteria.label: Strategic Alignment
criteria.description: How well the vendor's roadmap aligns with long-term organizational goals.
